name: Load-board high-rate offer (urgency)
subject: {{.FirstName}} — $4,650 LRD->CHI van load on the board, expires 12:00 CT
trucking_context: Dispatchers compete for posted loads against other carriers; an above-market rate with a short deadline mirrors the real load-board experience and pressures fast clicks.
indicators: Sender domain truckstop-portal.net is not truckstop.com
Rate ($4,650) is well above lane average ($2.10/mi RPM ~ $2,500)
Hard 12:00 CT deadline manufactured to suppress verification
Login required before viewing rate-con / BOL is unusual for a load already posted on a board
Minor grammar slip: 'cant book it' missing apostrophe
